info.title: dockerwaiter
info.description: A small utility for await multiple containers in a docker-compose waiting to have their exit codes

options.name: --containers
options.description:
Required. the container names that will be waited (they
must be comma separated if there is more than one)

options.name: --dockercompose
options.description:
Required. the docker-compose filename that launch the
containers

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
a timeout value in seconds for cleaning all the stuff
if it will not work, by default it will be 3600

options.name: --logPath
options.description:
Path for export the logs of the docker-compose
containers. if not set, it will be this directory, and
a logfile by container
